## Documentation Issue
Describe the documentation issue or missing information.

## Current Documentation
Link to or quote the current documentation (if it exists).

## What's Missing
What information or clarification is needed?

## Suggested Improvement
If you have suggestions for how to improve the documentation, please describe them here.

## Related Code/Feature
If this is related to a specific feature or code section, please reference it:

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked the existing documentation thoroughly
- [ ] This issue is about documentation only
